content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style issuer credit assessment for NordStar Industrials, dated 2025-11-14 on the issuer's Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. Like the Moody's anchor, this assessment incorporates NordStar's Q3 deleveraging and lands at BBB (mid), equivalent to the Baa2 notch. The leverage input matches the fresher post-filing data, so both anchor providers agree; only the stale MSCI view diverges.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative — not Morningstar DBRS data.
